text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I did it... I got first place.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I closed more of that distance between us... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... It's nice to feel the same way about
something...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best next time as well...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'll win, and we'll be able to share this feeling
again...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
After all, I still don't have what it takes to close
that gap...
